laws.title: Ohio Minimum Wage — 10.45/hr (2025)
laws.summary: Ohio's minimum wage is $10.45/hour effective January 1, 2025 (businesses with gross receipts over $385,000/year). Businesses below that threshhold pay the federal minimum of $7.25/hr. Tipped employees: $5.25/hr. Ohio adjusts its minimum wage annually based on CPI.
compliance_actions: Confirm Ohio employees are paid at least $10.45/hr (assuming over $385,000 in gross receipts)
Post the Ohio minimum wage notice at Ohio worksites
Update payroll systems for the January 1 change
